name: Easy Opera Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 oz) regular coconut cream pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the cherries and drain them on paper towels.
2. In a saucepan, combine the pudding mix, butter, and milk. Cook over medium heat until boiling.
3. Continue to boil for one minute while stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
5. Beat in sugar until smooth.
6. Stir in chopped walnuts and drained cherries.
7. Pour mixture into a 10x6-inch buttered baking dish.
8. Garnish with walnut halves, if desired.
9. Cut into squares when cooled. Makes 32 pieces.
